briefdescription.para: 0xB0 - Aes key should be programmed for DEC_ONLY eFuse programming
0xD0 - Dec only eFuse is already programmed
0xF0 - Already programmed eFuse Bit, can't be reverted
0xF1 - Error during validation of AES key write request as AES engine is disabled
0x8700 - Error in Meta header IV range programming
0x8800 - Error in Blk Obfus IV programming
0x8A00 - Error in Data Partition IV programming
0xB000 - Error in Writing Puf helper data efuse programming
0xB100 - Error in Puf syndrome data programming
0xB200 - Error in Puf Chash efuse programming
0xB300 - Error in Puf Aux efuse programming
0xEC00 - Error in programming of glitch configuration
0xED00 - Error in programming of glitch write lock
0xF000 - Error in Programming, no data is provided for Programming.
0xF100 - Error before programming eFuse, Temperature is out of range
0xF200 - Error before programming eFuse, Voltage is out of range
0xF300 - Error before programming eFuse, no supplies are enabled
0xF400 - Error before programming eFuse, new data is not available
0xFA00 - Error when eFuse access, is not enabled
0xFB00 - Error when accessed address range, of eFuse is invalid
0x20000 Glitch detected, due to which requested eFuses may be partially programmed
The following table lists the Versal common eFuse library error codes.
0x9D00 - Error in SECLOCKDBG_DIS bit1 efuse programming
0xC500 - Error Additional ppk enable bits are neither programmed/requested
0xCD00 - Error while trying to program user efuses 48 to 63 when ADD_PPK_EN bits are programmed
0xCE00 - Error while programming additional PPK's PPK0/PPK1/PPK2 are neither programmed/requested
0x10000 When user chooses PUF efuses as user efuses data provided for last row i.e row 255 is not valid
0xD000 - Error in reading Sec Ctrl efuses
0xD100 - Error in reading in Misc Ctrl efuses
0xD200 - Error in reading in Puf Ctrl efuses
0xD300 - Error in reading Puf syn efuses
0xD400 - Error in reading Puf Chash efuses
0xD500 - Error in reading Puf Aux efuses
0xD700 - Error in reading PPK hash efuses
0xD800 - Error in reading Meta IV efuses
0xD900 - Error in reading Blk IV efuses
0xDA00 - Error in reading PLM Iv efuses
0xDB00 - Error in reading Data Partition IV efuses
0xDC00 - Error in reading in Dec_only efuses
0xEE00 - Error in programming of Glitch ROM monitor or glitch halt boot
0xEF00 - Error in programming of ROM flow control halt boot bits for generic and environment errors
The following table lists the Versal eFuse library error codes.
0xAE00 Error in ROM Rsvd bits programming
0xAF00 Error in PUF SEC CTRL bits programming
0xF900 - Error PUF HELPER DATA should be programmed for DEC_ONLY eFuse programming
0xFC00 - Error occurred when DME Mode is set and trying to read User fuses
0xFD00 - Error occurred when DME is not supported for that specific platform
0xFE00 - Error, CRC value of the xilinx manufactured bits and value written into CRC SALT efuse does not match.
The following table lists the Versal common eFuse library error codes.
